hooks.command: bash -c 'file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then source /home/anatole/jupyter/.venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; if ! python3 -m py_compile "$file" 2>/tmp/cc_pce_err; then echo "[Claude hook] Erreur de syntaxe dans $file :"; cat /tmp/cc_pce_err; fi; fi'
